utterances.speaker: Chalana
utterances.text: Thanks for joining the meeting every month I just want to do a quick overview, and make sure we are all on the same page with the project goals.

utterances.speaker: Savishka
utterances.text: Yeah overall things are moving forward, but honestly some of the data science is I agree the task themselves aren't too difficult, but when multiple updates come in together it gets harder to stay focused.

utterances.speaker: Chalana
utterances.text: That's unstable and I appreciate you both being honest it sounds like the communication flow is there are things are getting confusing.

utterances.speaker: Savishka
utterances.text: Yeah and it pushed us into constant work mode which is okay short term, but.

utterances.speaker: Chalana
utterances.text: I hear you, and I don't want anyone to feel, but I'll just keep up with the schedule.

utterances.speaker: Savishka
utterances.text: Honestly, I appreciate that, because everyone is trying their best, but we also need some brands.

utterances.speaker: Chalana
utterances.text: Same here the team energy is still good, but the real organization would really help.

utterances.speaker: Savishka
utterances.text: Alright, here what we will do I will improve the task breakdown set explore set clear a milestone, and.

utterances.speaker: Chalana
utterances.text: Make it much easier to manage time, and priorities.

utterances.speaker: Savishka
utterances.text: And if something starts to feel confusing or too heavy please say something early, so we can fix it quickly.

utterances.speaker: Chalana
utterances.text: Oh sure that makes communications a lot easier.

utterances.speaker: Savishka
utterances.text: Agreed open communication really helps everything run smoothly.

utterances.speaker: Chalana
utterances.text: Cool let's step over support each other, and check-in again next week.

utterances.speaker: Savishka
utterances.text: Sounds good I will I will have my updates ready.

utterances.speaker: Savishka
utterances.text: Moving forward perfect appreciate you both.

Chalana: Oh sure that makes communications a lot easier.

Savishka: Agreed open communication really helps everything run smoothly.

Chalana: Cool let's step over support each other, and check-in again next week.
